title: Grisebachianthus plucheoides
taxonomy: Grisebachianthus plucheoides is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Grisebachianthus, which is a group of flowering plants. The species Grisebachianthus plucheoides is further classified into the subfamily Asteroideae and the tribe Heliantheae. This classification is based on the plant's morphological and molecular characteristics. Grisebachianthus plucheoides is native to Cuba, and its classification is an ongoing area of research in botany.
